title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Radisson India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Radisson India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, Radisson India in Rajkot is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Radisson India:
Radisson India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Radisson India!
